title: Local Supply Chain Mapper
problem_or_desire: Inefficiency in sourcing seasonal ingredients from multiple local farms.
core_concept: A centralized procurement dashboard for local farm inventory.
proposed_approach: A web app that aggregates inventory lists from local producers into a single ordering interface for chefs.
prototype_scope: A static inventory view for three local farms and a simple email-based order submission button.

title: Legal Workflow Traffic Controller
problem_or_desire: Uncontrolled document version chaos across external law firms.
core_concept: Automated synchronization of shared folder structures managed by intelligent filing agents.
proposed_approach: The agent moves incoming files into designated folders based on metadata patterns and alerts if structural changes don't adhere to house style.
prototype_scope: Automated folder sorting agent interfacing exclusively with shared enterprise cloud document repositories.

title: Zero-Waste Vending
problem_or_desire: Lack of healthy, affordable, and sustainable late-night food options.
core_concept: Automated kiosks dispensing hot, fresh meals in reusable, returnable containers.
proposed_approach: Install a smart vending unit that tracks container returns via QR codes to incentivize circular usage.
prototype_scope: One vending unit in a single dormitory lobby serving three types of hot bowls.

title: Technical Debt Resolution Tasking
problem_or_desire: Difficulty hiring fractional experts to debug one-off legacy code patches
core_concept: Micro-scope project matchmaking tailored strictly for specific framework codebases
proposed_approach: AI-moderated skill verification for legacy system languages to find precise specialist coders
prototype_scope: Manual pilot job-matching board restricted to three niche PHP and React bug-fixes

title: AI Coffee Palette Auditor
problem_or_desire: Mismatch between generic inventory bean selection and local customer latent flavour preference data
core_concept: Analyzing customer waste patterns via bin monitoring combined with QR-scan-based beverage survey inputs to optimize shelf supply
proposed_approach: Aggregating digital intake metadata from specific location footfall into heat maps characterizing taste skew for future inventory orders
prototype_scope: Implementing one tablet kiosk feedback gatherer integrated with traditional POS output in a non-traditional coffee setting like a co-working shared area

title: Personalized Traceability Identity (TI)
problem_or_desire: Lack of granular detail connecting payment to specific farmer/crop outcomes in mainstream coffee service channels
core_concept: Banking interface enabling customers to link their loyalty point spend directly to local agricultural school endowments
proposed_approach: Transaction routing through blockchain smart-contracts to transparently distribute surplus margins to individual coffee harvesters mentioned on labeling
prototype_scope: Ten-person feedback session simulated via a manual dashboard mapping donations to localized, known agricultural beneficiaries

title: Fresh-Roast Micro-batch Aggregator
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in tracking distinct flavor profiles from independent local roasters without shipping bloat
core_concept: Curated coffee subscription focused strictly on 48-hour roast freshness.
proposed_approach: A hyper-local subscription service that partners with three roasters to deliver beans roasted within 48 hours via a manual, fixed-route courier model.
prototype_scope: A manual subscription list for 20 local users, with a single courier picking up and delivering on a set day. | Secure commitment from 3 local roasters for specific roast days.; Recruit 20 local subscribers via email/social.; Execute 4 weekly delivery cycles using a manual spreadsheet for routing.

title: Remote Heritage Immersion Kitchen
target_user: Expats seeking nostalgia and traditional cooking comfort
problem_or_desire: Failure of traditional catering to capture regional specific 'feel' of comfort home-cooking
proposed_approach: A platform connecting heritage cooks with home cooks for live, remote cooking sessions.
prototype_scope: Facilitate 5 live video cooking sessions between heritage cooks and home cooks. | Recruit 2 heritage cooks; Recruit 5 home cooks; Facilitate 5 sessions; Gather feedback on the 'heritage' experience

title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
core_concept: Personalized coffee selection based on individual sensitivity to acidity.
proposed_approach: A subscription service that curates beans known for low-acidity profiles and provides a simple pH test kit for users to track their own reactions.
prototype_scope: A 10-person pilot using existing low-acid bean varieties and a basic pH strip kit to gather subjective feedback. | Source 3 known low-acid coffee varieties.; Recruit 10 participants with known sensitivities.; Distribute coffee and pH test strips for a 2-week trial.

title: Customer Support Resolution Agent
problem_or_desire: High volume of repetitive 'where is my order' inquiries consuming human agent time.
core_concept: An agent that autonomously interacts with logistics APIs to provide real-time status updates and initiate refunds if criteria are met.
proposed_approach: Direct integration with order management systems to execute actions rather than just providing information.
prototype_scope: A chatbot that successfully retrieves tracking data and processes a mock refund for a specific order ID.
